programme.title: The Jerk
programme.desc: Navin (Steve Martin) believes he was born a poor black child in Mississippi. He is, however, actually white. Upon figuring this out, he heads north to St. Louis to find himself. After landing a job at a gas station, Navin is excited to discover his name printed in the new phone book. programme.title: Animal House

programme.title: Wet Hot American Summer
programme.desc: Set on the last day of camp, in the hot summer of 1981, "Wet Hot American Summer" follows a group of counselors who are each trying to complete their unfinished business before the day ends. The entire summer of pent-up sexual frustrations, unresolved post-traumatic stress, pending separations and of course, the talent show, all weigh heavily on the minds and groins of counselors and campers alike

programme.title: Half Baked
programme.desc: When a member of their crew gets arrested for killing a New York City police horse by feeding it junk food, three slackin' stoners are forced to get off their butts and raise bail by selling pot stolen from a pharmaceutical lab. It's a risky plan but, hey, these are stand-up guys who would do anything to help out a friend in need.

programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.

programme.title: Obsessed to Death
programme.desc: Cassie becomes obsessed with the woman who stole her man away from her.

programme.title: Rush for Your Life
programme.desc: Journalism student Tasha goes under cover as a sorority pledge to expose the people responsible for the death of a student the prior year. She quickly finds herself completing dangerous hazing rituals to secure a spot in the sorority.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: Maurice is a streetwise ginger cat who comes up with a money-making scam by befriending a group of talking rats. However, when Maurice and the rodents reach the town of Bad Blintz, their little con soon goes down the drain.

programme.title: Selena + Chef
programme.desc: Artist, activist, and chef DeVonn Francis guides Selena through his version of an elevated banana-inspired Jamaican meal, including a torched banana cake and banana leaf roasted snapper.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. The key to saving the future lies buried in the secrets of the past and the hidden history of Transformers on Earth. Now, it's up to the unlikely alliance of inventor Cade Yeager, Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the world.

programme.title: Stephen King's It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: Die Alone
programme.desc: A young man with amnesia bands together with a rugged survivalist after a devastating virus causes a zombie-like outbreak.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters

programme.title: One Day This Kid

programme.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
